evals.prompt: Add validation for an untrusted webhook payload in a TypeScript service.
evals.expected_behavior: Finds the boundary, reuses existing validator patterns, keeps input unknown until validation, derives or maps types, and tests invalid payloads.
assertions: Validates at the first rejectable boundary
Reuses existing schema tools or a simple guard before adding dependencies

evals.prompt: Clean up this internal domain type alias; no external input is involved.
evals.expected_behavior: Does not apply schema-boundary guidance when there is no untrusted boundary.
